name: groupBy-non-vec-throws
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :GroupBySubjectNotVec
  :message "groupBy requires Vec subject, got number"
  :operand "groupBy"
  :position "subject"
  :expectedType "Vec"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step `groupBy(/k)` :input 42}
  :trail null
}

name: groupBy-non-keyword-key-throws
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :GroupByKeyNotKeyword
  :message "groupBy: key sub-pipeline must produce a keyword for every element, element 0 produced number"
  :index 0
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 1
  :fault {
    :step `groupBy(/k)`
    :input [{:k 1} {:k 2}]
  }
  :trail null
}

name: groupBy-roundtrip-via-vals-flat
query: let(:xs, [{:k :a} {:k :b} {:k :a}]) | xs | groupBy(/k) | vals | flat | count | eq(xs | count)
